actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.description: The tiger takes the Disengage or Hide action.

tactical_info.combat_role: Mobile Striker - High-stealth ambush predator with control
tactical_info.positioning: Uses high stealth for ambush, Nimble Escape for hit-and-run tactics
tactical_info.damage_output: 10 slashing damage with prone effect for battlefield control
tactical_info.key_abilities: Exceptional stealth (+7), Rend with prone, Nimble Escape mobility
tactical_info.weaknesses: No damage resistances, relies on stealth for survivability
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent ambush predator and mobile striker for jungle encounters
